stage2_derivation_seam.summary: Current critical-path seed for hardening the TextInput -> HingeObject derivation seam.
stage2_derivation_seam.decision_reason: This is the remaining load-bearing integrity seam after V4, bridge hardening, runner hardening, and supervisor control-plane work.

systems_to_algorithms.summary: Algorithmic roadmap beyond the current contract-governed systems stack.
systems_to_algorithms.decision_reason: Deferred until the systems stack yields enough high-fidelity failure data and a stable training objective.

paper4_managerial_capitalism.summary: Paper 4 seed on managerial capitalism, principal-agent bootstrapping, and the M-form control plane.
paper4_managerial_capitalism.decision_reason: Supervisor-scoped Paper 4 outline work was completed and archived; the live manuscript now continues directly from the canonical working draft and LaTeX bundle.

paper4_manuscript.summary: Manuscript seed for carrying the frozen Paper 4 outline into prose while addressing remaining framing and governance seams.
paper4_manuscript.decision_reason: Supervisor-scoped Paper 4 manuscript work was soft-decommissioned after yielding usable evidence and section drafts; the canonical manuscript now lives outside the supervisor loop.

v3_interface.summary: Legacy interface note for a stateful knowledge compiler and a stateless validator.
v3_interface.decision_reason: Superseded by the V4 kernel, bridge hardening, runner hardening, and supervisor-era birth/routing contracts.

ztare_open_source.decision_reason: Deferred until Paper 3 is stable enough to support a public practitioner artifact.

supervisor_artifact_lifecycle.summary: Deterministic artifact inventory and decommission lifecycle for supervisor-managed programs.
supervisor_artifact_lifecycle.decision_reason: Needed to make archival of closed programs programmatic and fail-closed rather than heuristic or memory-based.

vnext_semantic_gate_stabilization.summary: Deferred kernel hardening seed for stabilizing brittle semantic gates through structured extraction plus deterministic derivation.
vnext_semantic_gate_stabilization.decision_reason: This is a future bounded kernel-hardening candidate, not public-facing repo documentation.
